heading_soft_recall.definition: soft count inverse sum similarity, cardinality via soft count, recall card(G∩P)/card(G) intersection via union

heading_entity_recall.definition: percentage named entities in human-written article headings covered by O

prometheus_evaluator.model: Prometheus Kim et al 2023 13B open-source evaluator LLM assess long-form text customized 1-5 scale rubric
prometheus_evaluator.trimming: omit reference to avoid exceeding context limit, trim input article within 2000 words iteratively removing contents from shortest section to ensure fit
prometheus_evaluator.correlation: ratings without reference also correlate well with human preferences

citation_quality.metrics: citation recall and precision based definition Gao et al 2023

expert_evaluation.findings: more of STORM's articles deemed organized by 25% absolute increase and broad in coverage by 10% vs outline-driven RAG baseline
challenges: bias on Internet affects generated articles - source bias transfer
LLMs fabricate connections between unrelated facts - over-association
